title_i18n.en: Game Screenshot - Three Kingdoms ARPG: Lü Bu's Yuanmen Archery

description: An in-game action-RPG screenshot of the famous Three Kingdoms scene where Lü Bu shoots down a distant halberd at the camp gate to stop a battle. Rendered in the cinematic photoreal style of Black Myth: Wukong, Unreal Engine 5 Nanite/Lumen, third-person over-the-shoulder gameplay camera. Full in-game HUD overlay (HP + qi bars, minimap, skill hotbar, lock-on target marker with distance readout to the far halberd) makes it read as a real next-gen ARPG capture rather than a cutscene. Tuned for gpt-image-2 at 16:9.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 三国题材动作RPG游戏截图，呈现吕布辕门射戟止战的经典场景。采用Black Myth: Wukong式写实电影风格和Unreal Engine 5技术，第三人称越肩视角，包含完整游戏HUD界面（生命值和气条、小地图、技能栏、锁定目标标记及距离显示）。适配gpt-image-2的16:9比例。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 三國題材動作RPG遊戲截圖，呈現呂布轅門射戟止戰的經典場景。採用Black Myth: Wukong式寫實電影風格和Unreal Engine 5技術，第三人稱越肩視角，包含完整遊戲HUD介面（生命值和氣條、小地圖、技能欄、鎖定目標標記及距離顯示）。適配gpt-image-2的16:9比例。
description_i18n.ja: 三国志の名場面「呂布の轅門射戟」を再現したアクションRPGのゲーム画面。Black Myth: Wukong風のフォトリアルな映画的スタイル、Unreal Engine 5で描画。三人称視点のゲームプレイ画面に、完全なゲームHUD（HP・気力バー、ミニマップ、スキルホットバー、ターゲットロックと距離表示）を搭載。gpt-image-2向け16:9形式。
description_i18n.ko: 여포의 원문사극 장면을 구현한 삼국지 액션 RPG 게임 스크린샷. Black Myth: Wukong 스타일의 포토리얼 영화적 그래픽과 Unreal Engine 5 기술을 사용한 3인칭 숄더뷰 시점. 완전한 게임 HUD(HP 및 기력 바, 미니맵, 스킬 단축키, 타겟 록온 및 거리 표시)가 포함된 차세대 ARPG 화면. gpt-image-2용 16:9 형식.
description_i18n.de: Action-RPG-Screenshot der berühmten Three-Kingdoms-Szene, in der Lü Bu eine entfernte Hellebarde am Lagertor abschießt. Im fotorealistischen Kinematik-Stil von Black Myth: Wukong mit Unreal Engine 5, Third-Person-Perspektive und vollständigem Ingame-HUD (HP/Qi-Balken, Minimap, Skill-Hotbar, Zielmarkierung mit Distanzanzeige). Optimiert für gpt-image-2 im 16:9-Format.
description_i18n.fr: Capture d'écran d'action-RPG de la scène célèbre des Three Kingdoms où Lü Bu tire sur une hallebarde à distance à la porte du camp. Style photoréaliste cinématographique de Black Myth: Wukong avec Unreal Engine 5, vue à la troisième personne et HUD complet (barres HP/qi, minimap, hotbar de compétences, marqueur de cible avec distance). Optimisé pour gpt-image-2 en 16:9.
description_i18n.ru: Скриншот экшен-RPG знаменитой сцены из Three Kingdoms, где Люй Бу стреляет в дальнюю алебарду у ворот лагеря. Фотореалистичный кинематографический стиль Black Myth: Wukong на Unreal Engine 5, вид от третьего лица и полный игровой HUD (полосы HP и ци, мини-карта, панель умений, маркер цели с дистанцией). Оптимизировано для gpt-image-2 в формате 16:9.
description_i18n.es: Captura de pantalla de acción-RPG de la famosa escena de Three Kingdoms donde Lü Bu dispara una alabarda distante en la puerta del campamento. Estilo fotorrealista cinematográfico de Black Myth: Wukong con Unreal Engine 5, vista en tercera persona y HUD completo (barras de HP y qi, minimapa, barra de habilidades, marcador de objetivo con distancia). Optimizado para gpt-image-2 en formato 16:9.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Captura de tela de action-RPG da famosa cena de Three Kingdoms onde Lü Bu atira em uma alabarda distante no portão do acampamento. Estilo fotorrealista cinematográfico de Black Myth: Wukong com Unreal Engine 5, visão em terceira pessoa e HUD completo (barras de HP e qi, minimapa, barra de habilidades, marcador de alvo com distância). Otimizado para gpt-image-2 no formato 16:9.
description_i18n.it: Screenshot action-RPG della famosa scena dei Three Kingdoms in cui Lü Bu colpisce un'alabarda distante alla porta del campo. Stile fotorealistico cinematografico di Black Myth: Wukong con Unreal Engine 5, visuale in terza persona e HUD completo (barre HP e qi, minimappa, hotbar abilità, marcatore bersaglio con distanza). Ottimizzato per gpt-image-2 in formato 16:9.
description_i18n.vi: Ảnh chụp màn hình action-RPG tái hiện cảnh nổi tiếng trong Three Kingdoms khi Lã Bố bắn trúng cây kích ở cổng trại để chấm dứt trận chiến. Phong cách điện ảnh siêu thực của Black Myth: Wukong với Unreal Engine 5, góc nhìn thứ ba qua vai và HUD đầy đủ (thanh HP và khí, minimap, thanh kỹ năng, đánh dấu mục tiêu với khoảng cách). Tối ưu cho gpt-image-2 ở tỷ lệ 16:9.
description_i18n.pl: Zrzut ekranu z action-RPG słynnej sceny z Three Kingdoms, w której Lü Bu strzela do odległej halabарdy przy bramie obozu. Fotorealistyczny kinematograficzny styl Black Myth: Wukong z Unreal Engine 5, widok trzecioosobowy zza ramienia i pełny HUD (paski HP i qi, minimapa, pasek umiejętności, znacznik celu z odległością). Zoptymalizowane dla gpt-image-2 w formacie 16:9.
description_i18n.id: Tangkapan layar action-RPG dari adegan terkenal Three Kingdoms di mana Lü Bu memanah tombak yang jauh di gerbang kamp untuk menghentikan pertempuran. Gaya sinematik fotorealistis Black Myth: Wukong dengan Unreal Engine 5, kamera gameplay orang ketiga dan HUD lengkap (bar HP dan qi, minimap, hotbar skill, penanda target dengan jarak). Dioptimalkan untuk gpt-image-2 dalam format 16:9.
description_i18n.nl: Action-RPG-screenshot van de beroemde Three Kingdoms-scène waarin Lü Bu een verre hellebaard bij de kamppoort neerschiet om een gevecht te stoppen. Fotorealistische filmische stijl van Black Myth: Wukong met Unreal Engine 5, third-person over-de-schouder gameplay en volledige in-game HUD (HP- en qi-balken, minimap, skill hotbar, doelmarkering met afstand). Geoptimaliseerd voor gpt-image-2 in 16:9-formaat.
description_i18n.ar: لقطة شاشة من لعبة أكشن RPG للمشهد الشهير من Three Kingdoms حيث يطلق لو بو سهمًا على رمح بعيد عند بوابة المعسكر. بأسلوب سينمائي واقعي مثل Black Myth: Wukong مع Unreal Engine 5، عرض من منظور الشخص الثالث وواجهة HUD كاملة (أشرطة HP والطاقة، خريطة مصغرة، شريط المهارات، علامة الهدف مع المسافة). محسّن لـ gpt-image-2 بنسبة 16:9.
description_i18n.tr: Lü Bu'nun kamp kapısında uzaktaki mızrağı vurarak savaşı durdurduğu ünlü Three Kingdoms sahnesinin aksiyon-RPG ekran görüntüsü. Black Myth: Wukong tarzı sinematik gerçekçi grafik ve Unreal Engine 5 ile üçüncü şahıs omuz arkası görüş açısı. Eksiksiz oyun içi HUD (HP ve qi çubukları, mini harita, yetenek çubuğu, hedef işaretleyici ve mesafe göstergesi) içerir. gpt-image-2 için 16:9 formatında optimize edilmiştir.
description_i18n.uk: Скріншот екшен-RPG відомої сцени з Three Kingdoms, де Люй Бу стріляє в далеку алебарду біля воріт табору, щоб зупинити битву. Фотореалістичний кінематографічний стиль Black Myth: Wukong на Unreal Engine 5, вид від третьої особи через плече та повний ігровий HUD (смуги HP і ци, мінікарта, панель навичок, маркер цілі з відстанню). Оптимізовано для gpt-image-2 у форматі 16:9.
description_i18n.en: An in-game action-RPG screenshot of the famous Three Kingdoms scene where Lü Bu shoots down a distant halberd at the camp gate to stop a battle. Rendered in the cinematic photoreal style of Black Myth: Wukong, Unreal Engine 5 Nanite/Lumen, third-person over-the-shoulder gameplay camera. Full in-game HUD overlay (HP + qi bars, minimap, skill hotbar, lock-on target marker with distance readout to the far halberd) makes it read as a real next-gen ARPG capture rather than a cutscene. Tuned for gpt-image-2 at 16:9.

query.en:
In-game screenshot from a next-gen action RPG in the style of Black Myth Wukong, Unreal Engine 5 Nanite/Lumen rendering. Third-person over-the-shoulder gameplay camera, positioned about 2 meters behind and slightly above the playable character.

# Playable character
{argument name="character" default="Lü Bu, a Three Kingdoms era Chinese warrior general. Tall muscular build, long black hair tied in a high topknot with a phoenix-feather pin, wearing ornate crimson and blackened-iron lamellar armor with gold trim, a red silk cloak flowing behind him, a fanged guardian mask on his forehead"}.

# Action pose
The character is drawing a massive recurved warbow at full tension, an arrow nocked and glowing with {argument name="qi_color" default="orange"} qi runes, standing firm with a wide battle stance on dry yellow earth.

# Setting
{argument name="setting" default="An ancient Chinese military camp at golden hour, two wooden camp-gate pillars framing the scene with crimson banners bearing a bold calligraphy Chinese character. Distant in the background a lone halberd standing upright about 150 paces away against a blazing orange sunset with god-rays through dust haze. Soldiers silhouetted at the sides watching tensely."}

# IN-GAME HUD OVERLAY (clean semi-transparent dark backgrounds, game-studio UI polish)
- Upper-left corner: circular portrait of the character with a red vertical HP bar and blue qi bar, a Chinese calligraphy-style character name above.
- Upper-right corner: small round minimap with faint glowing dots and a compass ring.
- Lower-left: 4 circular skill icons with Chinese characters, each with cooldown rings.
- Lower-center: a narrow white button prompt with game-style border.
- Lower-right: stamina ring and dodge prompt.
- Center-screen upper-third: a locked-on target marker floating over the distant halberd with an orange diamond indicator and a small distance readout.

# Rendering
Photorealistic PBR materials, detailed fabric folds, subsurface-scattered skin, Unreal Engine 5 Nanite geometry. Golden hour rim lighting, volumetric sand particles, soft lens flare from sun. Slightly hazy atmosphere with depth fog. Cinematic but clearly gameplay-framed, not movie-cutscene.

Aspect ratio 16:9 landscape.

# Negative prompt
no watermark, no studio logos, no warped Chinese characters, no fake gibberish glyphs, no movie-cutscene framing, no first-person view, no anime cel-shading, no low-res UI, no duplicated HUD widgets, no extra fingers on the character, no modern clothing, no firearms, no generic Western fantasy look, no cluttered or overlapping UI panels, no signature.
